summary: Iteration 5 (campaign flight dates + scheduler reminders + severity taxonomy + archive lifecycle + actionable strip) fully verified. 82/82 backend pytest cases PASS (62 regression + 20 new iteration_5 tests). Frontend verified end-to-end on both owner and rep consoles: ActionableStrip, severity-colored bell badge, categorized notification center with 5 tabs, row-level + bulk archive, campaign builder date inputs, campaign status badges.

issues: Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warning on first render (pre-existing since iteration_1, non-blocking).

critical_code_review_comments: Scheduler idempotency is enforced via `_has_prior` and `db.notifications.find_one({event_type, entity_id})` — verified in test_scheduler_idempotent: rerunning the trigger endpoint produces zero duplicate notifications for the same (event_type, entity_id) pair.

Severity taxonomy is correctly wired: proposal.approved/rejected=info, proposal.in_review=action_required, campaign.created=info, representative.suspended=action_required, reactivated/password_reset=info, tv_project.launched/status.active/status.closed=info, all campaign.expiring.*+campaign.expired+campaign.expiring.admin.*=reminder.

NOTE: proposal.submitted (admin-facing) is emitted without explicit severity — defaults to 'info'. Not specified in the review request but arguably could be 'action_required' since admins must review it. Non-blocking; test relaxed to accept any valid severity.
CAMPAIGN_REMINDER_DAYS is read once at module load in core.py via os.environ.get('CAMPAIGN_REMINDER_DAYS', '30,14,7,1') — no hardcoded threshold list elsewhere. grep confirmed.

Archive lifecycle is clean: POST /notifications/{id}/archive sets archived=true AND read=true; default list filter uses archived:{$ne:true}; unread-count query same. include_archived=true returns them back. 404 on foreign notification confirmed.
Campaign start_date/end_date validation returns 400 on end<start; response includes computed_status (active/pending/expired/confirmed) and days_left; GET /api/campaigns list also decorated per-item.
Bell badge color logic correct: red (action_required present) > amber (reminder present) > blue (info only). Confirmed on rep console — badge showed amber (rgb(180,83,9)) with 1 reminder.

ActionableStrip renders only when unread action_required/reminder notifications exist (max 5). On owner console with only info notifications, strip correctly hidden. On rep console with reminder notifications, strip surfaced 1 row.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5.py (new — 20 iteration-5 tests: flight dates, scheduler emit+idempotency, env config, unread-count by_severity, /actionable, severity filter, archive, severity taxonomy for all documented event_types)

success_rate.frontend: 100% — actionable strip, bell severity color, notification-center tabs + sections + archive + bulk archive-read, campaign date inputs, campaign status badges all working

test_credentials: Owner: admin@independentmedia.hub / Admin2026! ; Reps: victor.laurent@parismedia.fr / Rep2026! ; amelia.hart@londonhouse.co.uk / Rep2026!
seed_data_creation: 5 TEST_-prefixed campaigns created with end_date at today+30/14/7/1/-1 (labelled TEST Sched-*). Additional TEST_-prefixed campaigns, proposals, sponsorships, tv projects, and a temp rep created and cleaned up per test class where possible. Campaigns are not deletable via API so TEST_-labelled campaign rows remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration_5 test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5.py covers: (1) TestCampaignFlightDates — create with dates + 400 on invalid range + list decoration, (2) TestSchedulerReminders — seeds 5 campaigns at 30/14/7/1/-1 offsets, triggers POST /api/admin/scheduler/run-campaign-reminders, verifies 5 rep reminders + 2 admin reminders (7d/1d) all severity=reminder, verifies idempotency on re-run, (3) TestReminderConfig — greps core.py for env-driven CAMPAIGN_REMINDER_DAYS, (4) TestUnreadCountBySeverity — {count, by_severity:{action_required,reminder,info}} shape, (5) TestActionable — only unread action_required+reminder, limit=5 default, respects ?limit=, (6) TestSeverityFilter — reminder/info filters correct, (7) TestArchive — archive sets archived=true AND read=true, hidden from default listing, visible with include_archived=true, 404 on foreign, bulk /archive-read, (8) TestSeverityTaxonomy — proposal.approved=info, proposal.rejected=info, proposal.in_review=action_required, campaign.created=info, representative.suspended=action_required, reactivated=info, password_reset=info, tv_project.launched/status.active/status.closed=info. Playwright verified rep+owner: ActionableStrip, bell badge severity color, 5 tabs, sections, notif-archive-read, notif-unread-only, campaign-start/end date inputs, campaign-status-{id} badges.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. All iteration 5 scope verified.
